title: HypurrCollective AMA Series: Pear Protocol.
summary_title: Pair trading on Hyperliquid: narrative trades with 400M volume in four months
summary_description: Pear Protocol founder explains pair trading mechanics, 45% win rate potential, and airdrop season two details.

key_moments.label: Pear Protocol intro: first pair trading platform in crypto
Why pair trading beats solo leverage: consistent profits through narrative trades
Key differentiators: charting, tokenized positions, automated take profit and stop loss
400M volume in four months, hundreds of active traders acquired
Airdrop season two: three NFT tiers, 50k to 100k volume thresholds
Deploying on Hyperliquid EVM: 75-80% done with execution APIs
Why Hyperliquid beats Arbitrum: points, staking, airdrops attract CeFi users
Hyperliquid solved cold-start liquidity via HLP and gasless trading
